mission.title: knative: Support startupProbe in webhook
mission.description: Support startupProbe in webhook. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify knative troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your knative deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative -n knative --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review knative configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant knative configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
kubectl get configmap -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative
```
## In what area(s)?

## What version of Knative?

v0.17.2-gke.3

## Expected Behavior

startupProbe should be supported.

## Actual Behavior

It seems startupProbe usage is actively prevented in serving webhook.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support startupProbe in webhook
steps.description:
I've pulled together a list of various probing scenarios that  [mentioned](https://github.com/knative/serving/pull/12565#issuecomment-1033880603) in a Google doc:

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ODpaq-7ChhF7UeN7OSgekPlDrZXhT-3DZUVyl0SGRGQ/edit

Figured it's easier to discuss in this issue
```yaml
apiVersion: serving.knative.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: hello
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: gcr.io/google-samples/hello-app:1.0
        startupProbe:
          exec:
            command: ["/usr/bin/test", "-f", "/start"]
          periodSeconds: 2
          failureThreshold: 100
```

steps.title: Confirm Support startupProbe in webhook is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative -n knative --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n knative --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
I've pulled together a list of various probing scenarios that  [mentioned](https://github.com/knative/serving/pull/12565#issuecomment-1033880603) in a Google doc:

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ODpaq-7ChhF7UeN7OSgekPlDrZXhT-3DZUVyl0SGRGQ/edit

Figured it's easier to discuss in this issue and/or the doc rather than in the PR...
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: serving.knative.dev/v1alpha1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: hello
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: gcr.io/google-samples/hello-app:1.0
        startupProbe:
          exec:
            command: ["/usr/bin/test", "-f", "/start"]
          periodSeconds: 2
          failureThreshold: 100

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with knative installed or the issue environment reproducible.
